name: Citizens Community Federal National Association
description_short: CCFBank is a community bank offering personal, business, and mortgage banking services across Minnesota locations with online and mobile banking access.
description_long: Citizens Community Federal National Association, operating as CCFBank, is a community-based bank serving customers across multiple Minnesota locations including Albert Lea, Blue Earth, Ellsworth, Fairmont, Mankato, Mondovi, Osseo, Strum, and Wells. The bank has been positioned as a local financial institution with emphasis on personalized service and community presence. CCFBank offers a comprehensive suite of banking products and services including personal checking and savings accounts, credit cards with rewards programs, mortgage lending, business banking solutions, and agricultural financing. The bank provides modern digital convenience through 24/7 online and mobile banking platforms, mobile deposit, and tap-to-pay capabilities via Visa digital wallets. What distinguishes CCFBank is its emphasis on agricultural and dairy industry expertise, with dedicated content and services tailored to farmers and agricultural producers, including specialized guidance on tax strategy and farm safety net programs. The bank also offers personalized mortgage services through dedicated experts and maintains customer-focused features like uChoose Rewards credit cards and credit monitoring tools. CCFBank operates as a traditional community bank model with physical branch locations alongside digital banking options, positioning itself between large national banks and credit unions. The bank's routing number is 291880330, and customer service is available at 800-590-9920. Their agricultural focus and local Minnesota presence serve a specific regional market, though like most community banks, they may have limitations in product innovation and competitive rates compared to larger national institutions or online-only banks. Many banks offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments, giving borrowers a clear payoff timeline.
services: Personal checking accounts with online and mobile banking
Savings accounts with competitive interest rates
Credit cards with uChoose Rewards program
Mortgage lending and home loan services
Mobile deposit and remote deposit capture
Debit card services with tap-to-pay and digital wallet
pros: Multiple physical branch locations across Minnesota for in-person banking
24/7 online and mobile banking with mobile deposit capabilities
Specialized agricultural and dairy industry financing expertise
Tap to pay and digital wallet integration with Visa
Zero fraud liability protection on Visa debit cards
uChoose Rewards credit card program for personalized rewards
Dedicated mortgage experts and flexible home loan options
cons: Limited geographic footprint restricted to Minnesota locations
No mention of competitive rate comparisons or promotional APR offers
Agricultural focus may result in less developed personal finance products for non-farming customers
Website lacks transparent pricing and fee schedules for accounts and services
No information about minimum balance requirements or account features comparison
best_for: Minnesota farmers and agricultural producers seeking specialized lending and financial guidance
Local Minnesota residents who value personal relationships and community banking
Small business owners in rural Minnesota communities
Customers seeking traditional banking with modern digital convenience features
diagnosis: CCFBank is best suited for Minnesota residents, particularly farmers and small business owners, who value community banking relationships and want access to agricultural expertise alongside standard banking services. The main caveat is that their services are geographically limited to Minnesota locations, making them impractical for customers outside this region, and their website provides limited transparency on rates, fees, and competitive product positioning.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
